title: Live L2 unavailable via MT5 DOM ? resolve the OSR/L2 book's live input before relying on it
source: Live MT5 probe 2026-06-16 (market_book_get -> None/Invalid params on XAU/BTC/EUR); MT5-only, no direct API
why: The competition MT5 server does NOT publish order-book depth via the DOM API (market_book_get returns None/'Invalid params' for all probed symbols), and there is no direct API (MT5-only). So LIVE we get top-of-book bid/ask only, NOT the 5-level ladder. The historical parquet L2 drop is historical-only. Consequence: even if the OSR/L2 book validates at the Jun-18 gate on parquet, it has NO live L2 feed to run on during Jun 21-26. The tournament sim (B0183) concluded a return edge is ESSENTIAL and the OSR book is the only candidate -> a backtest-only edge that cannot be fed live is not deployable. Must resolve the live-input question before counting on it.
value_rationale: Determines whether the L2 edge is live-deployable at all. If not, the edge leg of the strategy needs a top-of-book-only redesign or the posture leans harder on the survival book ? a launch-gating decision.
scope: Re-verify DOM at/after launch (21 Jun 22:00, when trade_allowed flips) ? market_book may enable then; confirm or rule out.
Confirm there is genuinely no alternate live L2 channel (no direct API; ask org in #rules-and-faq whether live L2 depth is exposed anywhere).
If no live L2: assess whether the OSR signal can run on TOP-OF-BOOK + tick dynamics only (degraded), or must be shelved live.
Quantify the degradation: re-run the B0184 OSR validation using only top-of-book features vs full ladder, to see how much edge survives without depth.
Feed the conclusion into B0182 (posture) and the architecture deck (honest about the live-data constraint).
recommendation: Treat as a live-deployability blocker for the L2 edge until DOM is confirmed at launch or a top-of-book-only variant is shown to retain edge. Do not assume the historical-L2 backtest transfers to a live top-of-book-only feed.
out_of_scope: Building an external L2 feed (no direct API available); the OSR strategy logic itself (B0165 frozen).

history.reason: Live MT5 probe: no DOM/L2 depth available; OSR edge has no live L2 feed via MT5 (the only connection).

B0185 question (does the edge survive top-of-book-only?) is UNANSWERABLE on the Jun-16 data: both full-ladder and top-of-book are event-starved (<=8 trades) -> below the measurability floor. Top-of-book fires marginally fewer events (consistent with depth adding a little signal) but neither is measurable. Live-L2-DOM re-verify at launch still pending; deferred until/unless a less event-starved signal design exists.

history.event: Organizer update (2026-06-16, via CEO): "working on an updated version to address the issue where MT5 data does not include Level 2 depth, released shortly." The live-L2-DOM blocker has a PENDING VENDOR FIX. Re-opens live deployability of the OSR/L2 edge -- but now gated on three things landing before the Jun 21 22:00 freeze: (a) the org actually ships live L2 depth, (b) Jun-18 gate verdict GO on parquet (B0184), (c) integration+test time of the live DOM feed into execution/. If the update slips past freeze, the edge stays backtest-only and undeployable. Do NOT count on it until the DOM API returns real depth at launch.
history.reason: Organizer says live L2 depth update coming shortly

RESOLVED/FALSIFIED 2026-06-16: re-probe shows live MT5 DOM NOW returns genuine multi-level depth (4-10 rungs, all 8 probed symbols incl crypto). The 'no live L2 feed' blocker is lifted — the organizer's pending fix appears shipped; the earlier empty book was a polling-timing artifact (async market_book_add). Live feed is a SYNTHETIC pricer ladder matching the parquet (fill-model input) => parity plausible. Forward edge-survival validation moves to B0188.
